product-insight-telemetry-via-server-kno.userFacingName: Product Insight Telemetry via Server Knobs - Rollout - Release
product-insight-telemetry-via-server-kno.userFacingDescription: Testing out the data and insights capture in the awesome bar.

address-autofill-desktop-pref-release-ro.userFacingName: Address Autofill Desktop ( Pref, Release Rollout )

encrypted-client-hello-fallback-mechanis.userFacingDescription: This experiment enables a fallback mechanism for Encrypted Client Hello. This feature maximizes compatibility with websites that have misconfigured or unexpected DNS configurations.

fx-accounts-ping-release-rollout-2.userFacingDescription: Enable sending the Fx Accounts ping.

title.raw: Pin sites you visit the most

subtitle.raw: To keep a site pinned to the start of the tab strip, right-click and choose Pin Tab.

pin-frequently-used-websites-en-promo-ro.userFacingName: Pin Frequently Used Websites - EN-* Promo Rollout, no min version
pin-frequently-used-websites-en-promo-ro.userFacingDescription: This rollout recommends users to try out pinned tabs as a way to keep frequently used websites within reach.

long-term-holdback-2026-growth-desktop.userFacingDescription: Long-term holdback for 2025 H1 Growth experiments

unified-api-for-spocs-and-top-sites-cont.userFacingName: Unified API for spocs and top sites - controlled rollout for release 133+
unified-api-for-spocs-and-top-sites-cont.userFacingDescription: We're switching to a new endpoint for the services supplying sponsored content and top sites to the new tab. This is a controlled rollout for 133 on the Release channel to that new endpoint.

desktop-release-rollout-show-relay-to-al.userFacingName: Desktop Release Rollout: Show Relay to all Browsers - "Next" Sign-up modal CTA
desktop-release-rollout-show-relay-to-al.userFacingDescription: Firefox Relay lets you hide your real email address to keep your identity safe. This study looks at how people use Relay in the Firefox browser on their computer.

1-callout-contextual-chatbot-suggestion-.userFacingName: 1-Callout Contextual Chatbot Suggestion Treatment A: Tab Switching Copy Rollout
1-callout-contextual-chatbot-suggestion-.userFacingDescription: Provide contextual suggestions for users who visit an AI chatbot website.

disable-enrollment-status-telemetry-for-.userFacingName: Disable Enrollment Status Telemetry for Firefox Desktop (via nimbusTelemetry)

fast-udp-for-firefox-treatment-fast-udp-.userFacingName: Fast UDP for Firefox - Treatment Fast UDP Release Rollout
fast-udp-for-firefox-treatment-fast-udp-.userFacingDescription: Fast UDP for Firefox's QUIC HTTP3 I/O.

enforce-crlite-results-and-limit-use-of-.userFacingDescription: CRLite is a privacy-preserving tool for checking the revocation status of TLS certificates. This rollout disables OCSP in favor of CRLite for most certificates.

visual-card-updates.userFacingDescription: Visual updates to the New Tab recommended stories and sponsored cards.

enable-nimbus-unenrollment-synchronizati.userFacingDescription: Switch to using the shared SQL datastore for Nimbus data store.

windows-ui-automation-release-rollout.userFacingDescription: Enables support for the Windows UI Automation accessibility framework.

refactor-new-tab-telemetry-rollout.userFacingDescription: We are testing sending of New Tab interaction events in the OHTTP (Oblivious HTTP) protocol, which better preserves user anonymity.

ohttp-merino-content-recs-rollout.userFacingDescription: Changes the method that the New Tab uses to request news stories. The request use protocol called OHTTP that provides greater user privacy.

downsample-uptakeremotecontent-events.userFacingDescription: This rollout is intended to turn off collection of the events in the remote settings uptake category for the majority of clients. https://dictionary.telemetry.mozilla.org/apps/firefox_desktop?page=1&search=uptake.remotecontent

store-new-tab-content-interactions-local.userFacingName: Store New Tab content interactions locally
store-new-tab-content-interactions-local.userFacingDescription: Store content interaction events (i.e. click, impression) on New Tab articles to local database. A topic and section name event is stored for use in future on-device ranking of articles.

multiple-profile-switching-rollout-v2.userFacingDescription: This feature makes it easier to create and manage different profiles.  This allows you to separate and protect your online life with a set of unique personal and task-based identities, created and defined by you, all in Firefox.

context-id-rotation-every-3-days.userFacingDescription: To help further reduce long-lived unique identifiers in Firefox Desktop, we want to begin regenerating the context ID every 3 days.

firefox-backup-feature-gradual-rollout.userFacingDescription: Enables the Firefox Backup feature for a small group of users on Windows 10.

new-tab-14802025121163751-to-release.userFacingDescription: This rollout ships New Tab version 147.0.20251114.194929 to the Release channel for version 146

update-newtab-telemetry-to-include-time-.userFacingName: Update NewTab telemetry to include time zone offset (v2)
update-newtab-telemetry-to-include-time-.userFacingDescription: Improves New Tab recommendations by adding time zone offset to existing anonymized telemetry on impressions and clicks of stories. This improvement only affects telemetry that is in the US. The time zone offset is clamped to common offsets within the continental US.

set-to-default-hamburger-menu-rollout.userFacingName: Set to Default - Hamburger Menu Rollout
set-to-default-hamburger-menu-rollout.userFacingDescription: Rollout: Add "set to default" to the hamburger menu

dont-defer-timeouts-while-loading-sicom.userFacingName: Don't defer timeouts while loading si.com
dont-defer-timeouts-while-loading-sicom.userFacingDescription: Add si.com to the list of sites which shouldn't defer timeouts while loading to avoid pages getting stuck in infinite reload loops

disable-safebrowsing-v5-for-desktop-rele.userFacingName: Disable SafeBrowsing V5 for Desktop Release

temporarily-disable-new-tab-train-hops-o.userFacingName: Temporarily disable New Tab train-hops on Linux for Beta and Release
temporarily-disable-new-tab-train-hops-o.userFacingDescription: This disables the New Tab train-hopping mechanism on Linux for Firefox 147+ while we investigate an issue with how New Tab train-hops interact with the XDG base directory mechanism.

smart-shortcuts-v3-lr2-no-lr-rollout.userFacingDescription: Adjusting presentation of shortcuts (topsites) displayed based on user's prior shortcut interactions and frecency.

ai-chatbot-page-summarization-mvp-v2-cop.userFacingName: AI Chatbot Page Summarization MVP - V2 Copy

link-previews-all-channel-rollout-withou.userFacingName: Link Previews - All Channel Rollout Without Onboarding Copy
link-previews-all-channel-rollout-withou.userFacingDescription: This opt-in test will leverage a local AI model to preview website content when users long-press or press shift and hover over links online. Key points for websites will be displayed in a pop-up dialogue. No browsing data is collected by Mozilla.

title.raw: New: Click and hold to preview links

subtitle.raw: See a short description, reading time, and more to decide if a link is worth the click. Also available on right-click.

link-previews-all-channel-rollout-with-o.userFacingName: Link Previews - All Channel Rollout With Onboarding Copy
link-previews-all-channel-rollout-with-o.userFacingDescription: Onboarding Message Callout for Link Previews Feature

sections-rollout-us-re-enable-customize-.userFacingName: Sections Rollout US: Re-Enable Customize Buttons
sections-rollout-us-re-enable-customize-.userFacingDescription: Firefox Home stories are organized into topical sections (Sports, Food, Travel)

new-tab-14912026012151415-to-release-147.userFacingDescription: This rollout ships New Tab version 149.1.20260121.51415 to the Release channel for version 147.0.3

subtitle.raw: Browse for gifts using a private window and be sure to surprise your special someone.

local-network-access-rollout-for-etp-str.userFacingName: Local Network Access Rollout For ETP Strict 100%
local-network-access-rollout-for-etp-str.userFacingDescription: Local Network Access restrictions for users with Enhanced Tracking Protections set to strict.

enable-ohttp-for-mars-communications-on-.userFacingName: Enable OHTTP for MARS communications on Release
enable-ohttp-for-mars-communications-on-.userFacingDescription: Enables OHTTP for communicating with MARS from New Tab on Firefox Release.

new-tab-14912026012151415-to-release-147.userFacingDescription: This rollout ships New Tab version 149.1.20260121.51415 to the Release channel for version 147

local-network-access-enablement-etp-stri.userFacingName: Local Network Access Enablement for ETP Strict 147-148
local-network-access-enablement-etp-stri.userFacingDescription: Local Network Access restrictions for users with Enhanced Tracking Protections set to strict.

value.spocPlacements: newtab_stories_1, newtab_stories_2, newtab_stories_3, newtab_stories_4, newtab_stories_5, newtab_stories_6, newtab_billboard

us-billboard-rollout-2026.userFacingDescription: Users in the US may see a Billboard ad size
